docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,734.07 FILED BY BENFIELD, MARIO A. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JUSTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-03-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-03-2026 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-18-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARIO A. BENFIELD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUSTIN WONG IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: THE ADDRESS PROVIDED DOES NOT EXIST IN SAN FRANCISCO. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BENFIELD, MARIO A. AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JUSTIN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENFIELD, MARIO A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WONG, JUSTIN $4,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,375.00, JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF V. DEFENDANT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-12-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JUSTIN
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, JUSTIN
EXHIBITS RECEIVED BY MAIL FROM DEFENDANT WONG, JUSTIN
EXHIBITS RECEIVED BY MAIL FROM DEFENDANT WONG, JUSTIN
